title: PTD To Illegal IPMAN & PTD Faction 2 In Cross River State: Stop Spreading Lies Against AIG Zone 6, & ADITOP - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has denied misleading reports making the rounds that the AIG Zone 6 in a recent meeting with Cross River State Chapter of Independent Petroleum Marketers Association Of Nigeria (IPMAN) and PTD Zonal officers opposed the operations of the Association
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has denied misleading reports making the rounds that the AIG Zone 6 in a recent meeting with Cross River State Chapter of Independent Petroleum Marketers Association Of Nigeria (IPMAN) and PTD Zonal officers opposed the operations of the Association of Distributors and Transportation of Petroleum Products (ADITOP) in Calabar.
